title: Android Broadcast Receiver Security Check
description: Android BroadcastReceiver components should properly validate incoming intents and check permissions to prevent security vulnerabilities. Unvalidated broadcast reception can lead to privilege escalation and unauthorized actions.
recommendation: Always validate intent data and check sender permissions in BroadcastReceiver.onReceive().
impact: Prevents unauthorized access and privilege escalation through broadcast intents.

noncompliant: public void onReceive(Context context, Intent intent) { processAction(intent.getAction()); }
compliant: public void onReceive(Context context, Intent intent) { if(isValidSender(context)) processAction(intent.getAction()); }

checks.message: BroadcastReceiver should validate incoming intents and check permissions
